Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Haojiajia Electronic Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Haojiajia Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. is a highly criticizable specimen of a hodgepodge shell company utilizing 'virtual cluster affiliation.' The forensic engine has forcefully cleansed the massive fake consumer electronics OEM system implicated by Apple Inc. at the underlying level. The official commercial system was clearly blinded by the 'Electronic Technology' in its name, extremely absurdly categorizing it into 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing,' and even mistakenly tagging it as a 'Small Enterprise.' The physical probe immediately punctured this disguise: the 2024 insured headcount is an extremely dismal '0 people,' and the paid-in capital is only 400,000 RMB. The most fatal contrast lies in its registered coordinates: 'Room 503-13, No. 6-4 Jiaying East Road, Qinhuai District, Nanjing City.' An address with a sub-number like '503-13' is the most typical 'virtual cluster registration address' in China's proxy bookkeeping industry (i.e., dozens of companies affiliated with a single desk). Even more comical is its business license, which is a completely uninhibited supermarket inventory list: besides selling electronic products and computers, it also sells flowers and gifts, auto parts, building materials, daily necessities, and even moonlights in marketing planning and graphic design. The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an electronic device manufacturing plant; it is a pure Zero-Employee Universal Trading Shell that is virtually affiliated. The owner (Yi Lang) spent a few hundred RMB to register this shell, with the purpose of being able to issue various types of invoices without any blind spots when engaging in various miscellaneous proxy selling (from selling flowers and fixing computers to selling car floor mats), or when taking on small freelance advertising/graphic design jobs.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 69)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / ZERO-EMPLOYEE TRADING SHELL & SPV
